description_long: This object is a framed picture featuring a simple, stylized drawing of a yacht sailing on blue water under a light blue sky with two cartoon-like clouds. The yacht is depicted with a brown hull and a white triangular sail, set against a minimalistic background. The frame is a reddish-brown color with a slightly textured, wood-like appearance, and it is thick and trapezoidal in shape. The back of the frame includes a support stand, allowing it to be propped up on a flat surface. The image is flat and two-dimensional, with no three-dimensional yacht structure present. The overall appearance is decorative, resembling a children's drawing or a playful art piece.
description: A framed picture with a cartoon-style yacht on blue water, set in a reddish-brown, wood-like frame with a support stand. The artwork is simple and decorative.
description_view_0: Front view showing the framed picture of a yacht with a brown hull, white sail, blue water, and two clouds.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the frame and the angled support stand extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back of the frame and the full width of the support stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the frame's thickness and the angled support stand from the other side.
attribute_hull_design: The hull is depicted as a simple, flat-bottomed monohull with a straight sheer line, colored brown, and no visible keels, chines, or additional markings.
attribute_deck_layout: The deck is represented as a single flat surface with a white triangular sail; no cockpits, walkways, railings, or deck equipment are visible in the drawing.
attribute_cabin_structure: No cabin structure is visible; the yacht is shown as a basic hull and sail illustration with no windows, doors, or superstructure.
